reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark optimize claims satisfied only for the bounded prompt optimize path whose packet flow, held-out eval-backed search route, selected candidate improvement, and retained proof artifacts are directly covered by current tests.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by current optimize packet-flow and CLI smoke tests: optimize packets are materialized from explicit evidence, held-out results are carried into search input, optimize search invokes eval-test for held-out and full-gate candidate checks, and the selected mutation candidate records reopenable evaluation artifacts and a passing full-gate checkpoint.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this satisfied only while the optimize packet-flow tests and eval-test-backed held-out/full-gate search route remain current; broaden evidence before claiming non-prompt targets or live provider optimization quality.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified for the current bounded prompt optimize route: with explicit packet evidence and held-out scenario results, optimize search can select an eval-backed mutation candidate over the seed while preserving held-out/full-gate evaluation artifacts, proposal references, and revision artifacts.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep user-facing wording scoped to selected prompt behavior in the tested route unless future evidence covers broader optimize targets, live provider search, or consumer-specific product runners.
